rules.cma_classification_text: Item 4: Advance payment from customers / deposits from dealers
rules.remarks: As per RBI Circular deposits  from dealers may be treated as term liability irrespective of tenure, if such deposits are accepted to be repayable only when the dealership is terminated after due verification by bank. However, in the absence of the same it is to be considered as current liability.
